random.cdisc.data 0.1.0
  • Reference

Generate Dataset

radam.Rd

Generate Dataset

radam(domain, N = 100, ..., ADSL = NULL, start_with = list())

Arguments

domain

dataset domain
N

number of pts
...

arguments forwarded to data generation function
start_with

named list with variable
ADLS

data set (to take USUBJID from)

Examples


DM <- rsdtm("DM")
ASL <- radam("ASL")
radam("ATE")
#>     USUBJID STUDYID PARAMCD                     PARAM        AVAL AVALU  CNSR
#> 1      id-1 STUDY A      OS          Overall Survival  84.6017664 MONTH  TRUE
#> 2      id-1 STUDY A     PFS Progression Free Survival  19.1056733 MONTH  TRUE
#> 3     id-10 STUDY A      OS          Overall Survival  17.0512940 MONTH FALSE
#> 4     id-10 STUDY A     PFS Progression Free Survival 158.6777345 MONTH  TRUE

#>                                                     EVNTDESC
#> 1                                      Last tumor assessment
#> 2                                              Randomization
#> 3                                             First Response
#> 4                                      Last tumor assessment
#> 5                                                      Death
#> 6   Disease Progression or Death Censored for Missing Visits
#> 7                                              Randomization
#> 8                                                      Alive
#> 9                                                      Death
#> 10                                                     Death
#> 11  Disease Progression or Death Censored for Missing Visits
#> 12                                     Last tumor assessment
#> 13                                             Randomization
#> 14                                       Disease Progression
#> 15                                                     Death

#> 198                                      Disease Progression
#> 199                                           First Response
#> 200                                            Randomization
radam("ARS")
#>     USUBJID STUDYID PARAMCD         PARAM AVALC AVAL
#> 1      id-1 STUDY A BESRSPI label BESRSPI    SD    3
#> 2      id-1 STUDY A  OVRINV  label OVRINV    PR    2
#> 3      id-1 STUDY A  OVRSPI        OVRSPI    PR    2
#> 4     id-10 STUDY A BESRSPI label BESRSPI    SD    3
#> 5     id-10 STUDY A  OVRINV  label OVRINV    CR    1
#> 6     id-10 STUDY A  OVRSPI        OVRSPI    NE    6
